calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ian Leipper, in pro per, Tel. 415.299.4412, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court denies plaintiff's request for continuance and adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BRIAN GETZ' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT as to the entirety of the complaint, is sustained without leave to amend. At the hearing on November 16, 2017, after Mr. Leipper had failed to file either a substantive opposition to the demurrer or a first amended complaint, the court gave Mr. Leipper until December 5, 2017 to do so and, if he did not, informed him that this case would be dismissed. Mr. Leipper's "Response to Demurrer" is not a substantive opposition. Since it appears that Mr. Leipper is either unable or unwilling to allege any viable claim against Mr. Getz, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR No. 6840; Dept. 302.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2017 Continued To Jan-30-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2017 Continued To Dec-15-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ian Leipper, In Propria Persona (415-299-4412) appears as self-represented plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Petra M. Reinecke of the law offices of Petra M. Reinecke (415-591-1102) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. Plaintiff requests and the Court grants more time to prepare with admonition to plaintiff.

DEFENDANT BRIAN GETZ' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, as to the entirety of the complaint filed by plaintiff Ian Leipper is CONTINUED to December 15, 2017 at 9:30 AM in Department 302/Law and Motion. Plaintiff shall either file opposition to the demurrer or file a new complaint by December 15, 2017. If plaintiff fails to do so by that date, the Court will sustain the demurrer without leave to amend and dismiss this action. Further notice is waived.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR No. 9711, e-mail: lreding@sftc.org. (L&M302)
